title: Set up Meilisearch for full-text search in Next.js
summary: Run Meilisearch via Docker, install meilisearch-js, configure indexes, index documents from your database, and add instant search UI with React.
declaration: I will set up Meilisearch for full-text search. This includes running a Meilisearch instance via Docker (or using Meilisearch Cloud), configuring the meilisearch-js SDK client, indexing documents from your database, and wiring up a search UI with debounced queries. If you need Algolia (hosted-only) instead, say so before I begin.
